title: One Piece: Netflix Announces New Animated Special
content: Today has been a major day for the One Piece franchise, as Netflix has dropped some significant info bombs regarding the Straw Hat Pirates. To start, the streaming service confirmed that the live-action adaptation would return next year, running with the title of One Piece: The Battle of Alabasta .
author: ComicBook

title: Muse Reveals Spring 2026 Anime Line-Up
content: Muse’s Spring 2026 anime line-up has officially been released, featuring a fresh wave of highly anticipated titles packed with action, fantasy, drama, and heartwarming moments that anime fans across the Philippines and Asia will surely enjoy.
author: Anime Corner

title: This Anime Game Is About to Deliver What I Have Wanted for Years
content: There is no shortage of anime games, but they face a unique challenge that other games do not. They need to balance fan service with gameplay systems that stand on their own. Some succeed by recreating iconic moments, while others try to expand on their source material with original stories.
author: ComicBook

title: Shonen Jump’s Most Controversial Series Is Getting a Surprise Revival
content: One of the most controversial series to ever end with Shuesha’s Weekly Shonen Jump magazine is coming back with a surprising new project that’s going to bring it to an entirely new medium.
author: ComicBook

title: 'Would Be F****** Shocked', 'Ridiculously Far Off': Gigguk Weighs In on Jujutsu Kaisen Anime Production Costs Debate
content: Streamer and recently-turned-anime-creator Gigguk chimed in on the popular debate concerning anime production costs, specifically the false claim that an episode of Jujutsu Kaisen costs $150k compared to Invincible ‘s $2.5 million.
author: Anime Corner

title: Vampire Hunter D Confirms 2026 Return With New Preview
content: For decades, Vampire Hunter D has long been thought of as one of the biggest anime movies of all time. Following the original release of the first movie in the 1980s, the only instance that saw D make a comeback to the anime world was with Vampire Hunter D: Bloodlust in the year 2000.
author: ComicBook

title: 2nd That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime Film Reveals English Dub Trailer, Cast
content: Crunchyroll revealed on Tuesday the English dub trailer and cast for That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime the Movie: Tears of the Azure Sea ( Gekijō-ban Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken: Sōkai no Namida-hen ), the second anime film in the That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime ( Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken )…
author: ANN

title: One Piece Releases First Look Trailer for New Netflix Anime Remake
content: A brand new One Piece remake anime is now in the works, and Netflix has given fans the first look at what to expect from The One Piece with its first teaser trailer. One Piece has made a huge comeback this Spring as following a few months of being inactive, the franchise has returned for a new season of the TV anime…
author: ComicBook

title: Dandadan Reveals Live-Action Adaptation, Junji Ito Crossover to Celebrate Major Anniversary
content: Momo and Okarun are one of the most popular dynamic duos in the history of anime, with the stars of Dandadan making a big splash thanks to not only their original manga but the first two seasons of their anime adaptation.
author: ComicBook

title: Live-Action One Piece Season 3 Premieres in 2027
content: Netflix announced on Tuesday that the third live-action season based on Eiichiro Oda 's One Piece manga will premiere in 2027 under the name One Piece : The Battle of Alabasta . The third season has previously cast Cole Escola as Bon Clay, Xolo Maridueña as Portgas D. Ace, Awdo Awdo as Mr.
author: ANN
